name: Specification Violation
description: Agent fails to follow task requirements or specifications
mitigation: Validate output against SRS requirements and acceptance criteria

name: Role Violation
description: Agent acts outside its designated role or responsibilities
mitigation: Check that agent actions align with assigned role definition

name: Step Repetition / Looping
description: Agent repeats the same steps or gets stuck in an infinite loop
mitigation: Monitor for duplicate actions and enforce timeout limits

name: Context Loss
description: Agent loses critical context from previous interactions
mitigation: Verify that agent retrieves and uses historical context from Blackboard

name: Coordination Failure
description: Agents fail to coordinate actions, leading to conflicts
mitigation: Verify that agents synchronize via Blackboard events

name: Communication Breakdown
description: Messages between agents are lost, malformed, or misinterpreted
mitigation: Validate message format and ensure delivery confirmation

name: Dependency Violation
description: Agent executes before dependencies are satisfied
mitigation: Check that all prerequisite tasks are completed before execution

name: State Inconsistency
description: Agents operate on stale or inconsistent state
mitigation: Verify that agents read the latest version from Blackboard

name: Poor Output Quality
description: Agent produces low-quality or incorrect results
mitigation: Run quality checks: code review, linting, test coverage

name: Incomplete Output
description: Agent produces partial results or stops prematurely
mitigation: Verify that all required artifacts are generated

name: Format Violation
description: Agent output does not conform to expected format

name: Hallucination / Factual Error
description: Agent generates false or nonsensical information
mitigation: Cross-check facts against knowledge base and external sources

name: Timeout / Unresponsiveness
description: Agent fails to complete task within time limit
mitigation: Enforce timeout and provide fallback strategy

name: Tool Invocation Failure
description: Agent fails to correctly use external tools or APIs
mitigation: Validate tool parameters and handle errors gracefully
